title: Codex Project Defaults
description: Per-project configuration for Codex model, effort, and service tier defaults. Place at .claude/codex-defaults.json in your workspace root.

model.description: Default model for full-capability tools (implement, review, resume). Use 'auto' to defer to ~/.codex/config.toml.

modelMini.description: Default model for lightweight tools (research, plan, debug, branch analysis). Use 'auto' to defer to ~/.codex/config.toml. Falls back to 'model' if not set.

effort.description: Default reasoning effort level. Use 'auto' to defer to ~/.codex/config.toml.

serviceTier.description: Service tier. Set to 'fast' for GPT Fast mode (requires ChatGPT auth).
